title: trachyrhachis torana
intro: Trachyrhachis torana, also known as the Himalayan tree fern, is a plant species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Trachyrhachis torana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's fiddlehead fronds are typically dried and used as a tea or infused in water to extract its medicinal properties.
